summary: Comprehensive testing of Beginner's Journey feature. All backend APIs (11/11 tests passed) and frontend UI features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed lessons during backend testing for idempotency and persistence tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey feature fully tested. All 5 stages render correctly. Stage unlocking works (Stage 1 unlocked by default, others locked until previous stage completed). Lesson detail view shows hero image, narration player, content, mini-tools, and action buttons. Mark as Complete updates progress. Mini-tools tested: 30-Second Breathing, Chakra Visual, Routine Builder. Try It Now buttons navigate to correct pages.

journey_page.navigation: ✓ Journey link in PRIMARY_NAV with Map icon
journey_page.title: ✓ 'Beginner's Journey' and 'Your Path to Wellness' headings
journey_page.progress_bar: ✓ Overall progress bar shows X/20 lessons
journey_page.stages_display: ✓ All 5 stages render (Foundation, Breath & Body, Mind & Meditation, Sound & Senses, Sacred Practices)

stage_locking.stage_1_unlocked: ✓ Stage 1 (Foundation) unlocked by default with Sparkles icon
stage_locking.stages_2_5_locked: ✓ Stages 2-5 locked with Lock icon and dimmed appearance
stage_locking.locked_click_disabled: ✓ Clicking locked stages does nothing (button disabled)
stage_locking.stage_progress: ✓ Each stage shows X/4 progress indicator

stage_expansion.lessons_list: ✓ 4 lessons displayed per stage with title and description

lesson_detail_view.back_button: ✓ 'Back to [Stage]' button returns to stage list
lesson_detail_view.narration_player: ✓ 'Listen to This Lesson' with voice selector (Nova)
lesson_detail_view.content_blocks: ✓ Text content, TRY THIS tips rendered
lesson_detail_view.mark_complete_button: ✓ 'Mark as Complete' button visible for authenticated users

mini_tools.chakra_visual: ✓ The Seven Chakras visualization (Crown to Root)
mini_tools.routine_builder: ✓ Build Your Routine with 8 practice options, selection shows 'Your routine:'

progress_tracking.mark_complete: ✓ Clicking 'Mark as Complete' shows toast and updates button to 'Completed'

unauthenticated_users.sign_in_prompt: ✓ 'Sign in to save your progress and unlock stages as you grow.' at bottom

backend_apis_tested: GET /api/journey/progress - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (returns progress object)
POST /api/journey/complete-lesson - 401 without auth, 400 without lesson_id, 200 with valid data
Idempotency - Completing same lesson twice doesn't duplicate
Persistence - Completed lessons persist in GET progress
Stage unlocking logic - Completing 4 lessons in stage unlocks next stage
